response.global_summary: The video features an introduction and talk segment by virtual performer Hoshimachi Suisei, followed by a live performance of her song 'SUPERNOVA'. The video serves as a promotional clip for a future concert.

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei speaks to the audience, introducing the segment and interacting with fans. Background noise and lights are present, but no vocal song is performed.
Hoshimachi Suisei performs her song 'SUPERNOVA' on a live stage. The screen shows promotional text for her concert in 2026.
